start.speaker: Rurik the Gatekeeper
start.text: Another one the barrier spat through. You're in the Ashen Vale now, convict. The gate behind me leads to the camp — and it stays shut until I say otherwise.

options.text: Open it, or I open you.

effects.text: You threatened Rurik. He opened the gate. He will remember.

options.text: You look thirsty. I know where the last shipment's brandy went missing.

effects.text: You bought Rurik with a lie about brandy. Hope he never checks.

options.text: The Vale Charter, third seal: no warden may hold a soul between barrier and camp past sundown.

effects.text: You quoted a charter that may or may not exist. Rurik blinked first.

options.text: How long have they kept you out here alone, Rurik?

effects.text: Rurik talked for an hour about the daughter he left outside the barrier. Then he opened the gate.

about_vale.speaker: Rurik the Gatekeeper
about_vale.text: A mining colony with a magic fence, is what. The Crown tips its condemned over the barrier and the Vale keeps them. The ore goes out. Nothing else does. Marda runs the camp; the Overseer runs Marda. That's the whole civics lesson.

opened_might.speaker: Rurik the Gatekeeper
opened_might.text: Easy. Easy! It's open. Walk through and see how far shoving gets you with the Overseer.

opened_guile.speaker: Rurik the Gatekeeper
opened_guile.text: Missing brandy, eh. You and I are going to get along — or one of us will. In you go.

opened_lore.speaker: Rurik the Gatekeeper
opened_lore.text: ...Third seal. Aye. Of course. In you go, lawyer. The Vale eats clever ones slower, they say. More chewing.

opened_heart.speaker: Rurik the Gatekeeper
opened_heart.text: Eleven years. You're the first to ask. Go on through before I remember what I'm for.
